recommendations.title: Fantozzi Against the Wind
recommendations.overview: The third film in the saga of the unlucky clerk Ugo Fantozzi, played by its creator, Paolo Villaggio.

recommendations.title: Fantozzi Still Suffers
recommendations.overview: After a hard day at work and a condominium-board meeting, accountant Ugo Fantozzi goes on a trip with his family. Unfortunately, he will face a nasty surprise upon his return.

recommendations.title: Super Fantozzi
recommendations.overview: Superfantozzi (1986) is an Italian film from 1986. It is the fifth film in the saga of the unlucky clerk Ugo Fantozzi, played by its creator, Paolo Villaggio. In this film, Fantozzi is portrayed in a surreal historical journey, from Genesis to 1980s.

recommendations.title: Fantozzi to the Rescue
recommendations.overview: Fantozzi is now retired but continues to go to the office where it is held up as a fine example of employees intending to do career.

recommendations.title: Fantozzi 2000 - The Cloning
recommendations.overview: Ugo Fantozzi was resurrected from the company where he worked because of a crisis, how it will end?Tenth and final chapter of the film series of Fantozzi character.

recommendations.title: Fantozzi Retires
recommendations.overview: After thirty years in the big corporation, Ugo Fantozzi retires. Suddenly, he needs things to do in everyday life and he tries a number of activities: helping Pina shopping; babysitting grand-daughter Uga; a trip to Venice; learning golf. He then fak

recommendations.title: Fantozzi in Heaven
recommendations.overview: One by one, with a sweet but inexorable rate, Ugo's colleagues, go to a better life. When Ugo is attending at one of the innumerable funerals, he and the priest remain involved in an accident. The doctor says that Ugo as only one week left to live

recommendations.title: Fratelli d'Italia
recommendations.overview: Three episodes held together by a common element: a car rented by three different characters.

recommendations.title: Fracchia The Human Beast
recommendations.overview: The world's greatest criminal and the world greatest loser share the same face... now they'll share the same life!

recommendations.title: Tifosi
recommendations.overview: Four different stories about italian football team’s supporter.
